summary.summary: PR and commits state a behavioral fix: change manual temp basal checking so it is performed for any PM instead of only for OmnipodKit (pr:gordolio/Trio#1218; pr:nightscout/Trio#1218; commit:713f9912dfa4; commit:82bd6236cf7f). The change set lists modifications to Trio/Sources/APS/DeviceDataManager.swift and Trio/Sources/Helpers/BasalDeliveryState+Extension.swift (file:456babda339b; file:77e4c7867744), and includes extensive Xcode project file edits (Trio.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj, file:65b106e402b8). The PR author also notes uncertainty about the large project-file changes (pr:gordolio/Trio#1218). Diff metadata reflects the merge commit and project-file adjustments (diff:8c8dd5e01b51).
summary.userFacingImpact: Intended to make manual temp-basal checks apply to any PM (broader than prior OmnipodKit-only behavior) if the code changes were applied as described (pr:gordolio/Trio#1218; commit:713f9912dfa4). The supplied diff and files list show project-file edits and that DeviceDataManager.swift and BasalDeliveryState+Extension.swift were changed (file:65b106e402b8; file:456babda339b; file:77e4c7867744), but the truncated diff does not show the precise Swift-code edits. Because the actual Swift-code diffs are not present in the supplied diff, a human review is required to confirm the exact behavioral impact and that no other side effects were introduced.
